title: adonis aestivalis var. citrina
intro: Adonis aestivalis var. citrina, also known as yellow rocket or yellow adonis, is a variety of flowering plant in the genus Adonis. It is a perennial plant with yellow flowers that are rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are often used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Adonis aestivalis var. citrina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and its roots and leaves can be used to make herbal preparations such as salves and poultices.
